toolPurpose: Retrieve current weather conditions for a specified location by city name or geographic coordinates (latitude/longitude).

q.description: City name or city name with country code (e.g., 'London' or 'London,GB'). Use this for location lookup by city name.

lat.description: Latitude coordinate for location. Use together with lon for coordinate-based queries. Range: -90 to 90.

lon.description: Longitude coordinate for location. Use together with lat for coordinate-based queries. Range: -180 to 180.

units.description: Unit system for temperature and wind speed: 'standard' (Kelvin), 'metric' (Celsius), 'imperial' (Fahrenheit). Default: standard.

lang.description: Language code for weather description (e.g., 'en', 'es', 'fr', 'de'). Default: en.

inputsSpec.note: Either 'q' (city name) or both 'lat' and 'lon' (coordinates) must be provided.

toolPurpose: Retrieve 5-day weather forecast with 3-hour intervals for a specified location by city name or coordinates.

q.description: City name or city name with country code (e.g., 'London' or 'London,GB').

lat.description: Latitude coordinate. Use together with lon. Range: -90 to 90.

lon.description: Longitude coordinate. Use together with lat. Range: -180 to 180.

lang.description: Language code for weather description (e.g., 'en', 'es', 'fr', 'de'). Default: en.

cnt.description: Number of forecast periods to return. Each period is 3 hours. Max 40 (5 days). Default: 40.

inputsSpec.note: Either 'q' (city name) or both 'lat' and 'lon' (coordinates) must be provided.

toolPurpose: Retrieve air pollution data (PM2.5, PM10, NO2, SO2, O3, CO) for a specified location by coordinates.

datetime.description: Optional ISO 8601 datetime string (e.g., '2023-12-15T12:00:00Z') to retrieve air quality at a specific time. Default: current time.

toolPurpose: Retrieve comprehensive weather data including current conditions, minutely precipitation, hourly forecast, 8-day daily forecast, and weather alerts for a location using the One Call 3.0 API.

lang.description: Language code for weather description (e.g., 'en', 'es', 'fr', 'de'). Default: en.

exclude.description: Data blocks to exclude from response to reduce payload: current, minutely, hourly, daily, alerts. Array items as strings.

toolPurpose: Retrieve historical weather data for a specified location and date range. Useful for analyzing past weather patterns and trend analysis.

start.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g., '2023-12-01'). Historical data available from 1979-01-01 onwards.

end.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g., '2023-12-31'). Must be after or equal to start date.

lang.description: Language code for weather description. Default: en.
